title: Payment retry loses idempotency key
description: A retry creates a new charge key rather than retaining the original attempt identity.
requirement: REQ-RETRY-1: Retrying a failed payment must reuse the original idempotency key so one invoice cannot be charged twice.

expectedFindings.title: Payment retry generates a new idempotency key
expectedFindings.description: Each retry submits a fresh generated key, allowing duplicate charges for the same invoice.
